name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeIngredient: Optional: grated chocolate or cookie crumbs for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crust ingredients (chocolate cookie crumbs, sugar, and melted butter) in a bowl. Press the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes. Cool completely.
2. In a separate mixing bowl, beat together the softened cream cheese, creamy peanut butter, sugar, softened butter, and vanilla extract until smooth.
3. Gently fold in the whipped heavy cream to create a smooth mixture.
4. Spoon the filling into the prepared crust.
5. Garnish with grated chocolate or cookie crumbs if desired.
6. Refrigerate until serving. Yield: 8-10 servings
